message:
test(mcp): add 21 unit tests for mcp_error code mapping

Cover: error code uniqueness/prefix invariants, McpToolError construction
(new/from_error), map_mcp_error dispatch (PaneNotFound/Timeout/NotRunning/
CliNotFound/Config/Storage/Workflow/Policy/fallthrough), map_caut_error
(NotInstalled/Timeout/other), map_cass_error (NotInstalled/Timeout/other).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
